note: Interim president Cheryl Venable (member_id=venable) took the Atlanta seat effective 2026-03-01; Raphael Bostic retired 2026-02-28. Only Venable's own monetary-policy/outlook publications since 2025-01-01 are kept. Bostic's 2025/2026 quarterly essays (through 'Farewell to the Best Job...' 2026-02-25), his Brookings 2026-03-26 speech, and his Feb 2026 FOMC commentary/podcast are EXCLUDED. Venable has one qualifying quarterly president's essay; her 2026 Financial Markets Conference closing remarks ('Technology's Transformative Role in Finance and Central Banking') were operational/ceremonial and not published as a standalone monetary-policy speech.
